# Total Space
> Total Space offers secure outdoor RV, boat, vehicle, tractor trailer, and fleet parking near Monroe, NC. Conveniently located at 1508 NC-218, Indian Trail, NC 28079 with gated access, cameras, and well-lit premises. Call (980) 455-8398.

This site provides information about available parking services, service areas across Union County, NC, and how to reserve a spot.

## Parking Services
- [RV Parking](https://www.totalspace.com/services/rv-parking.html): Secure outdoor RV parking with gated access, cameras, and flexible month-to-month leases
- [Boat Parking](https://www.totalspace.com/services/boat-parking.html): Safe boat storage with well-lit, monitored outdoor parking near Indian Trail, NC
- [Large Truck Parking](https://www.totalspace.com/services/large-truck-parking.html): Commercial and large truck parking with wide-lane access and 24/7 surveillance
- [Trailer Parking](https://www.totalspace.com/services/trailer-parking.html): Tractor trailer and utility trailer parking with easy pull-through access

## Getting Started
- [Size Guide](https://www.totalspace.com/size-guide.html): Visual guide to available spot sizes for RVs, boats, trucks, and trailers
- [Contact Us](https://www.totalspace.com/contact.html): Phone, email, address, and hours to inquire about availability or reserve a spot

## Service Areas
- [Parking Near Indian Trail, NC](https://www.totalspace.com/cities/indian-trail-north-carolina.html): Serving Indian Trail and Union County residents with secure outdoor parking
- [Parking Near Marshville, NC](https://www.totalspace.com/cities/marshville-north-carolina.html): Convenient parking solutions for Marshville area vehicle and RV owners
- [Parking Near Mint Hill, NC](https://www.totalspace.com/cities/mint-hill-north-carolina.html): Outdoor vehicle and RV parking for Mint Hill and southeast Mecklenburg County
- [Parking Near Unionville, NC](https://www.totalspace.com/cities/Unionville-noth-carolina.html): Secure parking for Unionville and surrounding Union County communities
- [Parking Near Weddington, NC](https://www.totalspace.com/cities/Weddington-north-carolina.html): Serving Weddington and southern Union County with monitored outdoor parking

## About
- [About Total Space](https://www.totalspace.com/about.html): Facility overview, security features, and commitment to the Indian Trail community
- [Home](https://www.totalspace.com/): Main landing page with parking options, facility features, and reservation info
